B) In over 60% of angiosperm, pollen
grains are shed at 2 — cell stage
C) Both A & B
D) None of these
Page No.-23, Easy
23. Pollen allergy is not correlated with-
A) Cause of parthenium
B) Cause chronic respiratory disorder
C) Carrot grass that come into india as a
contaminant with imported rice
D) None of these
Page No.-24, Easy

A) 30 min
B) Several month
C) Same as in sonaceae
D) Both B& C
Page No.-24, Easy

semen for artificial insemination-
A) 196°C B) -196°C
C) 34°C D) 4°C

events:

ii) Apocarpous
